title: How to link a Google spreadsheet with a Monday dashboard

posts.author: fcojnav (Francisco )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello good morning

I need to be able to connect a dashboard with a Google spreadsheet, the changes made on Monday are replicated to the spreadsheet.

I know there are connectors like Zapier for example, but do you know of any automation that could help me or something that is not paid?

Thank you so much.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Francisco,

I am afraid this is a functionality that isn’t supported natively. In order to sync changes from a dashboard to google spreadsheet, I do believe that you would need look into third party tools/apps to this, which likely will come at an extra cost. I am certainly happy to share this feedback with our team internally for future changes and improvements

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Francisco,
If you are okay with using third party apps, you can give a try to Smart Spreadsheet for monday. It does exactly what you ask for within monday: the app connects a dashboard to a spreadsheet and automatically updates it if there are any changes on the board. You can add a spreadsheet as a view, widget, document and/or a separate table (object).
Find out more in the documentation or book a free live demo with our specialist.

posts.author: Mykola (Mykola Pustovoychenko)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @fcojnav

We’ve built resynced.io with the puprose of syncing monday.com with different apps. At the moment, it is connected with Google Sheets. We’re on the beta stage and the app is free until the release.

Feel free to check it out: resynced.io - monday.com Marketplace
